/* ========= WRITE TEXT ========= */
function writeText(text, posList, colorList) {
    if (typeof text !== \'string\') return;
    let OGX = posList[0];
    for (let char of text) {
        writeCharToXY(char, colorList, posList[0], posList[1]);
        if (char === \"\\n\") {
            posList[1] += 1;
            posList[0] = OGX;
        } else posList[0] += 1;
    }
}

/* ========= 32-BIT BASE-256 COUNTER ========= */
let counter32 = 0;
const MAX_VALUE = 0xFFFFFFFF; // Set maximum counter value

function toBase256Glyphs(num) {
    num = num >>> 0;
    const b1 = ((num >>> 24) & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2,\"0\");
    const b2 = ((num >>> 16) & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2,\"0\");
    const b3 = ((num >>> 8)  & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2,\"0\");
    const b4 = ( num         & 0xFF).toString(16).padStart(2,\"0\");
    return braille256[b1] + braille256[b2] + braille256[b3] + braille256[b4];
}

/* ========= 64-BIT BASE-256 TIMESTAMP ========= */
const YEAR_OFFSET = BigInt(Math.round(319232061 * 365.2425 * 24 * 3600 * 1000));
let SPEED_MULTIPLIER = 1;

const realStart = performance.now();
const baseUnix = BigInt(Date.now()) + YEAR_OFFSET;

function toBase256Glyphs64(big) {
    const out = [];
    for (let i = 7; i >= 0; i--) {
        const byte = Number((big >> BigInt(i*8)) & 0xFFn);
        out.push(braille256[byte.toString(16).padStart(2,\"0\")]);
    }
    return out.join(\"\");
}

function getBase256Timestamp() {
    const elapsed = ((Date.now() / 0.9765625) * SPEED_MULTIPLIER);
    const big = baseUnix + BigInt(Math.floor(elapsed));
    return toBase256Glyphs64(big);
}

/* ========= INTERVAL UPDATES ========= */
setInterval(() => {
    // 32-bit counter
    const glyphs = toBase256Glyphs(counter32);
    writeText(glyphs, [0, 10], [0,0,0]);
    counter32++;
    if (counter32 > MAX_VALUE) counter32 = 0;

    // Accelerated timestamp
    const ts = getBase256Timestamp();
    writeText(ts, [0, 12], [0,0,0]);
}, 20);"𜶧$u"javascript: var lineDraw = function (){var URL = \"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/KyleCypher/owot@1.0/lineDraw.min.js\";var script = document.createElement(\"script\");script.src = URL;document.head.appendChild(script);}();"╬$u"javascript: var _writeChar=writeChar;function getRandomInt(a,b){return Math.floor(Math.random()*(b-a"𜶠

    // Lookup table for all 64 sextant combinations (0-63)
    // Ordered by binary: bit 0:top-left, 1:top-right, 2:mid-left, 3:mid-right, 4:bot-left, 5:bot-right
    const sextants = [
        \" \", \"𜃬\", \"𜃭\", \"𜃮\", \"𜃯\", \"𜃰\", \"𜃱\", \"𜃲\", \"𜃳\", \"𜃴\", \"𜃵\", \"𜃶\", \"𜃷\", \"𜃸\", \"𜃹\", \"𜃺\",
\"𜃻\", \"𜃼\", \"𜃽\", \"𜃾\", \"𜃿\", \"🮌\", \"𜄀\", \"𜄁\", \"𜄂\", \"𜄃\", \"𜄄\", \"𜄅\", \"𜄆\", \"𜄇\", \"𜄈\", \"𜄉\",
\"𜄊\", \"𜄋\", \"𜄌\", \"𜄍\", \"𜄎\", \"𜄏\", \"𜄐\", \"𜄑\", \"𜄒\", \"𜄓\", \"🮍\", \"𜄔\", \"𜄕\", \"𜄖\", \"𜄗\", \"𜄘\",
\"𜄙\", \"𜄚\", \"𜄛\", \"𜄜\", \"𜄝\", \"𜄞\", \"𜄟\", \"𜄠\", \"𜄡\", \"𜄢\", \"𜄣\", \"𜄤\", \"𜄥\", \"𜄦\", \"𜄧\", \"🮐\"
    ];

    // Build reverse lookup for instant character-to-bitmask conversion
    const charToBit = {};
    sextants.forEach((s, i) => charToBit[s] = i);

    function getSextantData(x, y) {
        // Calculate world coordinates
        const mpX = x - positionX - Math.trunc(owotWidth / 2);
        const mpY = y - positionY - Math.trunc(owotHeight / 2);
        
        const charX = Math.floor(mpX / cellW);
        const charY = Math.floor(mpY / cellH);
        
        const locX = (mpX / cellW) - charX;
        const locY = (mpY / cellH) - charY;

        // Determine which of the 6 sextant blocks (bits) the mouse is over
        // Column: 0 or 1 | Row: 0, 1, or 2
        const col = locX > 0.5 ? 1 : 0;
        const row = Math.min(Math.floor(locY * 3), 2);
        const bitIndex = (row * 2) + col;

        // Tile/Cell coordinate extraction
        const tileX = Math.floor(charX / tileC);
        const tileY = Math.floor(charY / tileR);
        const inTileX = ((charX % tileC) + tileC) % tileC;
        const inTileY = ((charY % tileR) + tileR) % tileR;

        return {
            tx: tileX, ty: tileY, cx: inTileX, cy: inTileY,
            bit: bitIndex,
            current: getChar(tileX, tileY, inTileX, inTileY)
        };
    }

    document.addEventListener(\'mousemove\', function(e) {
        if (e.ctrlKey) {
            const data = getSextantData(e.clientX, e.clientY);
            
            // Get current bitmask or default to 0 (empty)
            let mask = charToBit[data.current] !== undefined ? charToBit[data.current] : 0;
            
            // Add the new bit (shading)
            const newMask = mask | (1 << data.bit);
            const nextChar = sextants[newMask];

            // Only write if the character actually changes to save bandwidth
            if (nextChar !== data.current) {
                if (typeof writeCharTo === \'function\') {
                    writeCharTo(nextChar, YourWorld.Color, data.tx, data.ty, data.cx, data.cy);
                }
            }
        }
    });

    alert(\"ctrl + mousedrag\");

                                                                                                                                                𜵌𜴓𜴄 𜶄𜵱𜵙
